words.definition: The amount of work assigned to a particular worker, normally in a specified time period
words.indonesian: Arti workload dalam konteks pembelajaran IELTS.
words.example: workload is often used in formal and academic English.

words.definition: A person authorized to act as representative for another; a deputy
words.indonesian: Arti delegate dalam konteks pembelajaran IELTS.
words.example: delegate is often used in formal and academic English.
